nexus_high_floor.description: Sort by floor clearance (worst case still clears)

nexus_close_game.description: Only games with spread <= 4 (starters play full minutes)

nexus_minutes_iron.description: Sort by mins_30plus_pct desc (most stable minutes)

nexus_gap_monster.description: Sort by absolute gap only (biggest projection edge)
